subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam-Husayn! The manifest Light hath dawned forth from the horizon of the Will of the Lord of the worlds, and the soul-stirring Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلامحسین نور مبین از افق اراده رب العالمین مشرق و لائح و ندای جان فزای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
